content: Self-Refine’s single-perspective iterative self-feedback framework can be augmented by integrating multiple inconsistent self-perspectives from modern LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a hybrid self-improvement pipeline that retains Self-Refine’s key advantage of needing no external supervision or training while reducing the common blind-spot bias that plagues single-perspective self-refinement. This hybrid framework works by having the LLM generate multiple conflicting critical assessments of its own initial output from different inconsistent reasoning perspectives before selecting the most consistent feedback to guide each refinement iteration.
